untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of market direction (falling/rising for several days) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed single-bar indicators. CPR (Central Pivot Range) is not in the allowed indicator list; using pivot as closest proxy. Market preceding condition (multi-day trend detection) requires lookback logic not supported by allowed operators.
translation_notes: Translated CPR closure conditions to pivot crossovers. The core requirement to detect multi-day falling/rising trends before entry cannot be fully expressed with allowed indicators—this would require custom logic comparing multiple historical bars or a trend-detection indicator like ADX or slope calculation over N periods. Recommend adding sma_5_vs_sma_20_slope or similar to properly implement the 'falling for several days' precondition.
